bucket_name.description: Name of the Cloud Storage bucket used for exporting logs, required for metrics with export functionality.

bucket_options.description: Defines the bucket options for distribution metrics, specifying bucket boundaries and layout for histogram data.
bucket_options.type: list(object({explicit_buckets: list(object({bounds: list(number)})),exponential_buckets: list(object({growth_factor: number,num_finite_buckets: number,scale: number})),linear_buckets: list(object({num_finite_buckets: number,offset: number,width: number}))}))

description.description: Specifies the human-readable description for the logging metric; used to explain the metric's purpose or details.

disabled.description: Determines whether the logging metric is disabled; set to true to disable the metric, otherwise false.

filter.description: Defines the criteria used to match log entries for the metric; must be a valid logging filter expression.

label_extractors.description: Defines a mapping of labels extracted from log entries to labels included in the metric, requiring valid label keys and values.

metric_descriptor.description: Defines the configuration for the metric descriptor, including type, labels, and description, used to describe the metric's schema and purpose.
metric_descriptor.type: list(object({display_name: optional(string),metric_kind: string,unit: optional(string),value_type: string,labels: list(object({description: optional(string),key: string,value_type: optional(string)}))}))

name.description: Specifies the name of the logging metric, which must be unique within the project and adhere to Google's naming conventions.

timeouts.description: Defines the amount of time to wait for the creation, update, or deletion of the logging metric.

value_extractor.description: Defines a value extraction expression used to extract a value from log entries, required for distribution metrics or when using advanced field extraction.
